title: tarenna austrosinensis
intro: Tarenna austrosinensis, also known as South China Tarenna, is a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to southern China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. The herbal preparations of Tarenna austrosinensis typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
